title: AI Fact or Fiction: The Fable Ban, Tokenmaxxing, Saaspocolypse — With Ara Kharazian
summary: Ara Kharazian, lead economist at Ramp, discusses data-driven analysis of AI spending patterns and whether businesses are getting real value from AI investments. The discussion evaluates claims about Anthropic overtaking OpenAI in adoption, "tokenmaxing" trends, DeepSeek's resurgence, and whether the predicted SaaS apocalypse is materializing.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz hosts Ara Kharazian, lead economist at Ramp, to assess claims about AI adoption and spending using Ramp's transaction data. The conversation tests several propositions: whether Anthropic is overtaking OpenAI in business adoption, the rise of "tokenmaxing," DeepSeek's resurgence, and whether the predicted SaaS apocalypse is actually materializing. The framing centers on whether businesses are getting real value from AI investments rather than on model benchmarks. The data-driven format separates measured spending patterns from speculation about each trend.
